name: exo
systemHint: Use `exo send` to spawn or continue persisted conversation subagents. When called from inside an Exocortex parent conversation, `exo send` runs detached by default and the daemon posts a `[notification]` back to the parent when the child completes. Use `--foreground` only when you intentionally want to block, and `--no-notify` to suppress the callback. `exo llm` is synchronous one-shot text generation and does not create a persisted conversation. Run `exo -h` for commands/options.
